title: Senior Doctor - Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!
